title: PipelineProfile
description: A composable configuration profile that controls how the accessibility tagging pipeline processes a document. Profiles bundle per-stage knobs so operators can select a named preset (e.g. 'legal', 'scientific', 'scanned-low-quality') and optionally override individual fields. Stages read from the resolved profile at runtime, falling back to defaults when a field is absent.

profileId.description: Stable machine identifier. Used in API calls and file names.

label.description: Human-readable name shown in the dashboard and API responses.

description.description: One-paragraph explanation of when to use this profile, shown in the dashboard profile picker.

extends.description: profileId of a base profile whose fields are inherited. Overrides in this profile take precedence. Null or absent means no base (all fields are explicit or defaulted).

parserConfig.description: Controls PDF text extraction and OCR fallback behavior.

ocrMode.description: auto: OCR only when pages look empty/sparse. off: never OCR. force: OCR every page. required: fail if OCR fails.

ocrLanguages.description: Tesseract language codes (e.g. 'eng', 'spa+eng', 'jpn'). Empty = auto-detect from extracted text.

ocrMaxAttempts.description: Retry limit for failed OCR profiles before accepting the best candidate.

sparseTextBlockThreshold.description: Pages with this many text blocks or fewer trigger OCR (when ocrMode=auto).

sparseCharacterThreshold.description: Pages with this many extracted characters or fewer trigger OCR.

sparseCoverageThreshold.description: Coverage ratio (text area / page area) below which OCR triggers.

minAcceptedOcrScore.description: Minimum OCR confidence to accept a candidate over native text.

minCharacterGain.description: OCR must yield at least this many more characters than native to replace.

characterGainMultiplier.description: Multiplier applied to minCharacterGain for final acceptance threshold.

renderVariants.description: Rendering profiles for OCR page images. More variants = better accuracy, slower.

recognitionProfiles.description: Tesseract page segmentation mode profiles. Multiple profiles enable consensus scoring.

layoutAnalyzerConfig.description: Controls column detection, heading classification, and table inference.

columnGapThresholdPercent.description: Fraction of page width used as the base column-gap threshold.

columnGapMinPixels.description: Minimum absolute pixel gap to consider a column boundary.

columnConfidenceDivisorPercent.description: Fraction of page width used as divisor in column confidence formula.

headingScoreThreshold.description: Font size ratio (vs. baseline) to classify as heading.

headingBoldScoreThreshold.description: Font size ratio for heading classification when text is bold.

headingH1Threshold.description: Ratio at or above which heading is classified as H1.

headingH2Threshold.description: Ratio at or above which heading is classified as H2 (below H1).

rowTolerancePixels.description: Vertical proximity (pixels) for grouping blocks into candidate table rows.

tableRowMinItems.description: Minimum columns per candidate table row.

tableRowMinSpanPercent.description: Minimum row width as fraction of page width to qualify as table.

tableRowMinGapPixels.description: Minimum inter-column gap in a candidate table row.

semanticEngineConfig.description: Controls role classification, confidence assignment, and structural grouping.

confidenceDefaults.description: Default confidence scores by role. Keys are role names (Artifact, Table, TH, TD, LI, H1, P, etc.).

tableContinuationDistanceY.description: Max vertical gap (pixels) to continue a table across blocks.

tableContinuationDistanceX.description: Max horizontal gap (pixels) to continue a table across blocks.

listGapThreshold.description: Max vertical gap (pixels) to continue a list group.

languageHint.description: BCP-47 language tag hint (e.g. 'en', 'es', 'ja'). Null = auto-detect.

readingOrderConfig.description: Controls how extracted blocks are sorted into logical reading order.

lineGroupEpsilon.description: Vertical tolerance (points) for grouping blocks into the same visual line. Blocks within this distance sort left-to-right instead of top-to-bottom.

columnBandThresholdPercent.description: Fraction of horizontal span used as the column-band detection threshold.

columnBandMinPixels.description: Minimum absolute pixel gap between column bands.

paragraphMergerConfig.description: Controls how consecutive text lines are merged into logical paragraphs.

strategy.description: Merge strategy. 'text-structure' detects page margin and median spacing for 80%+ reduction. 'pairwise' uses the original confidence-based pair merging. 'disabled' passes through unchanged.

enabled.description: Enable paragraph merging. When false, the stage passes through unchanged.

gapMultiplier.description: Lines merge when vertical gap ≤ lineHeight × this multiplier. Lower = stricter merging.

xAlignmentTolerance.description: Maximum horizontal offset (pixels) between consecutive lines to still consider them aligned.

heightVarianceTolerance.description: Maximum relative difference in line height (fraction) to consider lines same-font.

minConfidence.description: Minimum merge confidence to actually combine blocks. Below this, blocks stay separate with a report entry explaining why.

sentenceBoundaryPenalty.description: Confidence penalty when the preceding line ends at a sentence boundary (period/colon followed by capital on next line).

reportUnmerged.description: Include detailed reasoning for lines that were NOT merged in the paragraph-merge report.

headingLevelClampMin.description: Minimum heading level (H1=1). Headings above this are clamped.

headingLevelClampMax.description: Maximum heading level (H3=3). Headings below this are clamped.

fontEmbedderConfig.description: Controls font analysis and embedding remediation (font-embedding-hardening branch).

fallbackStrategy.description: How to handle fonts that can't be embedded from the source.

licenseFlagPolicy.description: What to do when fsType indicates restricted embedding.

overlayFontPath.description: Path to a TTF/OTF to use as the overlay font. Null = use bundled Noto Sans.

fontCacheDir.description: Directory for re-embeddable font program cache. Null = no cache.

stripCidSet.description: Remove /CIDSet from subsetted Type0 fonts to satisfy PDF/UA 7.21.4.2.

veraPdfFlavour.description: veraPDF validation flavour (ua1, a1a, a2b, etc.).

skipFontAudit.description: Skip the pre-veraPDF font audit pass.

skipVeraPdf.description: Skip veraPDF entirely (useful when Java/veraPDF isn't installed).

redactorConfig.description: Controls SSN redaction and similar PII masking.

ssnPattern.description: Regex pattern for detecting SSNs. Default: standard XXX-XX-XXXX.

ssnMaskFormat.description: Output format for masked SSNs. {last4} is replaced with the last 4 digits.

bboxPaddingX.description: Horizontal padding (pixels) around redaction bounding boxes.

bboxPaddingY.description: Vertical padding (pixels) around redaction bounding boxes.

maxStageAttempts.description: Default retry limit per stage (can be overridden per-stage).

agentPollIntervalMs.description: Remote agent polling interval in milliseconds.

agentHeartbeatIntervalMs.description: Remote agent heartbeat interval in milliseconds.

evaluationConfig.description: Ground-truth and scoring metadata for the evaluation harness.

groundTruthRef.description: Path or URL to a ground-truth corpus for this profile. Null = heuristic scoring only.

scoringWeights.description: Relative importance of each metric in the aggregate score. Keys: veraPdfFindings, fontEmbedCoverage, readingOrderInversions, ocrConfidence.

acceptanceThresholds.description: Per-metric thresholds below which a run is considered failing.
